texto: It is beautiful to discover our wings and learn how to fly
autor: flight is a beautiful process. But then to rest on the wings of God as He flies: this is divine.
explicacao: Citação de flight is a beautiful process. But then to rest on the wings of God as He flies: this is divine. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “It is beautiful to discover our wings and learn how to fly” articula reflexao, c-joybell-c, beautiful em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
